summary: Multi-tenant Customer Portal testing complete. All backend APIs (18 tests) and frontend UI flows PASSED. Portal correctly implements path-based multi-tenancy at /portal/{tenant_code}/* with login, dashboard, tickets, devices, contracts, and profile pages.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test company data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer portal fully tested. Portal routes: /portal/{tenantCode}/login, /portal/{tenantCode} (dashboard), /portal/{tenantCode}/tickets, /portal/{tenantCode}/devices, /portal/{tenantCode}/contracts, /portal/{tenantCode}/profile. All data-testid attributes present for automation. Test tenant: test-company-085831 with 5 tickets, 25 devices, 14 contracts.

backend_api_tests.invalid_tenant: PASSED - All endpoints return 404 for invalid tenant
backend_api_tests.tickets_endpoint: PASSED - GET tickets with search, pagination, status filters
backend_api_tests.devices_endpoint: PASSED - GET devices with search, warranty filters
backend_api_tests.contracts_endpoint: PASSED - GET contracts with active/expired counts
backend_api_tests.profile_endpoint: PASSED - GET profile with company info and stats
backend_api_tests.analytics_endpoint: PASSED - GET analytics with KPIs, charts data

frontend_ui_tests.login_page: PASSED - Company branding, email/password fields, Sign In button
frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASSED - Successful redirect to dashboard after login
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard: PASSED - KPI cards (Open Tickets, Resolved, Devices, Contracts, SLA), charts (volume trend, warranty status, pie charts), recent tickets
frontend_ui_tests.navigation: PASSED - All 5 nav links present (Dashboard, Tickets, Devices, Contracts, Profile)
frontend_ui_tests.tickets_page: PASSED - Table with 5 tickets, search input, status filters (All/Open/Closed)
frontend_ui_tests.devices_page: PASSED - Table with 25 devices, search input, warranty status cards
frontend_ui_tests.contracts_page: PASSED - 14 contract cards with active/expired status badges
frontend_ui_tests.profile_page: PASSED - User info, company info, stats (25 devices, 5 tickets, 14 contracts)
frontend_ui_tests.invalid_tenant: PASSED - Shows 'Portal Not Found' error page
